summary: iOS | FALCON | Custom Button setting is not properly refreshed after disconnecting headset from PC
scenario: Custom Button setting fails to refresh available options after disconnecting the headset from PC, requiring an app restart to update.
description_clean: Custom Button setting is not properly refreshed after disconnecting headset from PC. After unplugging the Falcon headset from a PC with Teams, the custom button setting still shows MS Teams as connected and does not update to reflect the change in available options. Only restarting the app refreshes the setting, allowing the user to change other providers. Expected: After disconnecting the headset from the PC, the user should be able to change Custom Button settings immediately.
steps: Connect the Falcon headset to a PC running Microsoft Teams
Open the Custom Button settings in the app
Verify that MS Teams is shown as connected in the settings
Disconnect the headset from the PC
Observe the Custom Button setting display
Attempt to change the Custom Button to another provider
expected: After disconnecting the headset from the PC, the user should be able to change Custom Button settings immediately. The available options should update to reflect the disconnection.
actual: After unplugging the Falcon headset from a PC with Teams, the custom button setting still shows MS Teams as connected and does not update to reflect the change in available options. Only restarting the app refreshes the setting, allowing the user to change other providers.
